overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character walking through a covered stone walkway of a gothic castle, passing other students, and approaching a wooden door. The scene features historic stone architecture with arched ceilings and lush green surroundings under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with gothic arches

events.description: student in dark robes passes by on the left side of the walkway
second student passes by on the left, moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered stone corridor of the castle

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the camera character

entered.detail: series of stone arches forming the vaulted roof of the walkway
stone railing with decorative cutouts along the left side
stone railing with decorative cutouts along the right side
thick stone columns supporting the arched ceiling at intervals
lush green trees visible through the arches on the right side
gothic stone castle tower with pointed roofs visible through left arches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone walkway with gothic arches and balustrades on both sides. Other students in robes pass by in the opposite direction. Through the arches, lush green trees and parts of the castle building are visible under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden door at end of walkway

events.description: walkway narrows as the character approaches the large wooden door at the end

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the end of the covered walkway

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and iron hinges at the end of the walkway
ornate stone archway framing the wooden door with decorative masonry

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the end of the walkway where a large wooden door with an ornate stone frame comes into view. The left balustrade falls behind as the space narrows, and the stone arches of the ceiling appear closer overhead. No other characters are present in this final approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open gothic walkway that gradually narrows into a secluded stone corridor. It begins with the character walking past other robed students beneath a series of high arches, where lush green trees and castle walls are visible under an overcast sky. As the character advances, the open balustrades fall away and the surrounding space tightens, shifting the focus from the expansive outdoor scenery to the heavy masonry of the architecture. The scene then closes in as the stone ceiling arches appear lower overhead, leading the camera directly toward a large wooden door set within an ornate stone frame.
